meaning: Marker/point identifier from RINEX header. Basis for matching point records.
Antenna model from ANT # / TYPE record. Cross-checked vs operator-entered antenna_model.
ARP height above marker from ANTENNA: DELTA H/E/N record, as configured in the device. Often 0.000 if unset. Second independent height source.
Receiver model from REC # / TYPE / VERS header record.
Receiver firmware/version from RINEX extended header where written. May be null.
Approximate ECEF position from header (autonomous seed). Used for set-spacing computation only — not scored as accuracy.
RINEX format version (e.g. 2.11, 3.04). Drives PPK-software compatibility.
Constellations present (GPS/GLONASS/Galileo/BeiDou).
First observation epoch time (UTC).
Last observation epoch time (UTC). Cross-checked against oplog session_end_utc when oplog is expected-present.
Whether L1+L2 (or more) carrier phase is present. Single-frequency worsens iono impact.
Device serial / ID from RINEX header. Cross-checked vs operator-entered device_id.
Nominal logging interval between epochs.
Count of recorded epochs in the occupation.
Carrier-to-noise density per satellite per epoch. Basis for signal quality and multipath risk.
Cycle-slip indications per satellite. Elevated counts indicate disturbance or obstruction.
Position dilution of precision over time.
Tracked satellite count over time. Acquisition ramp visible at session start.
True only if recording stopped by deliberate operator action. Null = unconfirmed (DGPS) or expected-absent (CB_X / AEROPOINT / OTHER).
Count of mid-session unexpected shutdowns/resets. >=1 raises GCP_POINT_DEVICE_FAILURE.
Battery level at occupation start.
Battery level at occupation end.
Lowest battery level reached during occupation. Adequacy line: >= 20%.
Device-reported session end (UTC). Cross-check vs RINEX last epoch.
True once the RINEX has been transferred off the device.
Enum: CB_X / AEROPOINT / DGPS / OTHER. Drives oplog branching and antenna-height auto-fill logic.
Operator-entered device ID. Cross-checked vs RINEX header device_id.
Locked to GCP for this score. CHECK_POINT points are excluded from gcp_score (future check_point_score).
Operator-selected antenna model. Cross-checked vs RINEX antenna_type.
Operator-entered height. For CB_X / AEROPOINT, factory-known and auto-filled (indicator = 100). For DGPS, operator-measured. Cross-checked vs RINEX antenna_delta_h when populated.
Explicit units (m/ft).
VERTICAL or SLANT. Only meaningful for DGPS.
ARP / SLANT_MARK / MOUNT_BOTTOM / OTHER. Only meaningful for DGPS.
Number of independent measurements. Only meaningful for DGPS.
Fixed pole/tripod height when applicable.
Target physical type (printed_paper / painted / aeropoint_surface / cb_x_surface / dgps_peg / other).
Target minimum linear dimension. CAPTURED HERE but consumed by pre_processing_score for #11 visibility check; not read by gcp_score.
Operator confirmation that target was placed and visible at flight time. Reported as metadata; not scored in gcp_score (handed to pre-processing).
Drone flight start (UTC) from upload bundle.
Drone flight end (UTC) from upload bundle.
